key_dialogue: Welcome to the garden. Some generic stuff about the game and gardens and blah blah
You can start by setting up a Bird Feeder and Bed, Rememeber once you use a slot it cannot be changed until the next generation!
In the Flower Bed you can plant seeds and harvest them for crops and a small chance to get rare items, be warned tho your plants can also wither away!
In the Bird Feeder you can select a feeder and try differnt types of foods to attract differnt birds!
I specialize in beds. Need more space for your plants?||You can buy additional plots with the upgrade!
Now that you have a second plot you should think about fertilising
Perhaps its time to start thinking about automation
I know birds. Want to attract more?
ambient_dialogue: The birds are quite active today.
